author: Andrey Arutyunov
text:
Nice and cozy pub in European style in the heart of Petah Tikva high tech industry zone. Great variety of draught and bottled beers, light appetizers of pretty good quality, sandwiches are tasty and served really quick.
Prices are really low in relation to average pub  prices in the area. Has a big outside terrace with a relaxed atmosphere, interior design is beautiful and matches a real pub atmosphere.

author: Lior Medina
text: Great location, right on the cycle path, and as such, excellent for refueling. The professor burger was really good and the Cuban sandwich was sublime. Add a good assortment of beers and an amiable service and we have a winner!

author: Denis Mogilevsky
text: Great bar. Many places available, great selection of tap beers, and decent food. There's no need to wait for a waiter, which is really nice (self-service). It is one of the cheapest places to get tap beers in israel. Do be warned, the place fills up fast, even with the large amount of seating options available, so it's not recommended to arrive there late. The food is decent, and the selection of food is not too wide, but there are some solid choices. Especially for appetizers. Also- props to the guys and gals on the register. All of them are super nice.

author: Ariel Angel
text: I visited other sites of the same branch in Sharona, the prices here are even cheaper. The beer served are fresh and the staff know their beer. I haven't tried the food but the options look decent. I mean 23 nis for a pretty good Guinness? Yes please!

author: Oren Vilner
text:
The atmosphere, the beers, the food - the prices.

This place has a lot of space to sit - inside and outside, many kind of fresh food.

author: Sam Durak
text: This one used to be Aroma, now it's kind of a strange pub. There is no service at all, you should order at the counter every and each time, which is good usually for pubs with counter sittings, but there is no such here.  The place is not nice and it's not fun sitting there. Total fail, the only star for a good variety of beers.

author: Lina Vilderman
text: Nice, not expensive place. Stuff is super nice and friendly. Food is good.

author: Michael Shnayderman
text:
This is the best place to chill with your friends!
Cheap Alcohol (a lot of different beers and other drinks). Cheap and tasty food.
Make sure you give this place a chance.

author: Pavel Antokolsky
text: Good selections of beers, a lot of sitting space inside and outside, okaish food

author: Avner Dolinger
text:
The music was great, classic rock and even metal
Also nice prices

author: Liviu Cohen
text:
Very good beer choices. Reasonable prices. A good atmosphere is a very nice place to hang out with friends. The fish and chips are not the best. I liked the roastbeef sandwich.The hot dog wasn't good
Game again and ordered their new smash Burger which was amazing. Also the chips that came with it. What excellent

author: Alexey Brook
text: Very good choice of draft beer, and fair prices - starting from ~20 for 0.5l. Food is OK, but a long queue and quite full in late evening hours. Sitting is mostly outside, in a very nice veranda and around the place.

author: Oren B.
text: Great selection of draft beer and at comparatively affordable prices. Decent food too. The atmosphere is more pleasant in this branch than the ones in Tel Aviv, where the crowd is younger and noisier.

author: Omer Meister
text: One of the top bars in petach Tikva. All of the beers are around 20 shekel, wide variety of beer styles, along with some other liquor options. Ordering and serving is at the bar itself so you don't have to deal with waiting for a waiter or forced tipping (although with their fair prices and kind service, I think they do deserve in this particular place), crowded on weekends. Nice music too.

author: Yamkela
text: Great food and drinks. Often the only place open during holiday.

author: Alex Bondarev
text:
Some of the food/snack options are a bit on the expensive side.
Good beer variety and excellent prices.
There's no table service which makes the prices as low as they are.
Mostly clean and quite pleasant.
Music is almost always good.

author: Tamir Zitman
text:
Affordable and great variety of beers.
Not the best service in terms of cleaning tables etc

author: Hadas
text:
Yes! I LOVE this place!

Free of pose and anything. This place has a wonderful variety of beer, great munch dishes and all for reasonable prices.

Plus, I love-love-love the hard rock / metal / psy-trance playing in the evenings.

I hate to say this, but... Yes, this place is right for everyone.

author: Anna Ujv鈹溍璻i
text:
My new favorite daytime place. Perfect sandwiches, perfect beer (even Guiness is perfect!), really nice service, good environment. Lots of places to sit. Beers to go in bottles.
Parking is usually available, if the parking lot is full just go up to the roof parking.
So strongly recommended.

author: Itiel Tischler
text: Good food, friendly staff and chilly vibes

author: Miki Olsher
text: Very unique place where all alcohol and food priced very reasonably!

author: zaza shakarashvili
text: Can't say much, I drank two glasses of beer in a short time and left.  Snacks could be better

author: Ofek Shoham
text:
First, it's important to clarify there are no waiters here. When you wish to order, you go up to the bar, ask for a beer and pay for it immediately. All the beer we've tried was high quality, despite being very cheap in comparison to most bars in Petah Tikva. The atmosphere is nice and light, and the music was OK and not too loud, which is a big plus.

All in all, probably the best bar I've been to in Petah Tikva so far. Big kudos to the owners.

author: Amir Almagor
text: Great place for great beers and all sorts of drinks. Highly recommend!!!

author: Archie
text: great prices, good sitting places outside. everything you need in a bar. Gets a bit busy on Thursday and Friday around the evening but that's not too bad as you can basically go sit somewhere on the grass near it or just order 1 liter beers to go

author: Chen Oren
text:
So this is a self service bar which makes the pricing amazing.
There are no waiters so you need to go order and pickup yourself.
Definitely coming back there.

author: Gavriel Hochstein
text: Have a great selection of beers over 15 on tap!!, the place offers a lot of seating areas inside and outside and the staff is really nice and explains about every beer and gives tastings

author: maayan levy
text:
The food was not good, we even got a burnt meal. Even the mustard was off, most likely expired. The place itself was very loud and smelled of tabbaco.
We did not have a pleasent experience, and will not be going there again in the future.
Would not recommend.

author: Michael Antel
text: Nice place to meet with friends

author: Nir Sucher
text: Great food gteat beers

author: Daniel P
text: Except for the fact that a bunch of beers were not available I love this chain. The prices are great, the food options are great, service depends on you and you need to deal with waiters.

author: Nick Veronski
text:
Great atmosphere, kind service. pay as you go. low prices for all the beers.
No happy hour needed because of the initial Beer low prices.

author: Ronen Drukman
text: Great beer with excellent prices. Tasty food like fried with blue cheese , meat/Vegan burgers etc. Irish/TelAvivian vibes.

author: Irit Karvitsky
text: Been at the PT branch, Great place for beer and chill after a long day at work. Cute outside sitting area and affordable prices.

author: Masha Pavlov (MushNush)
text: Nice and relatively cheap place, but it gets really crowded an it almost has no places to sit where the AC reaches you so it gets really hot in summer

author: Marcel
text: An enjoyable pub / beer garden without the garden. An interesting selection of beer and decent food. Nice place. I脭脟脰d go again.

author: Ofer Lax
text:
Great place, good vibe, awesome people (the bartenders) and honestly fair prices.
I will definitely come back here again with my friends.

author: Francis Ubanozie
text: Nice environment with great vibes. Has parking and smoking point. A place to hang out with family and friends.

author: Michael Gendelman
text:
Great selection of beers,
Good prices

author: slonn
text: This is a lovely place, cheap prices, good beer, nice vibes! The best pub in Petach Tikva.

author: itaye elenzweig
text:
Great beer and cheap.
Large selection and the staff and all really nice and helpful for those who aren't familiar with the brands

author: Arkadii Frolov
text: Responsive and fast staff. Sufficient number of beers. It is likely that in the evening it will be difficult to find a free place.

author: Tal Rosner
text:
Nice location, not much of a service
Diy style

author: Alex
text: Authentic British style pub, with wide beer choice, good service. Nice place for evening relax.

author: Jonathan Knight
text: Pavel B. was here and he was pleased by IPA.

author: R
text: Great prices and good beer. Take into account that this place is not for fine dining.

author: Neithan Conway
text: Great food and atmosphere. Lovely bartenders and wide range of drinks

author: Navon Parag
text: Wide variety of beers and great price, food is OK, self service

author: Eitan Bloch
text:
I spent almost an hour waiting in lines to order and still only got to order half of what I wanted.
It was a bad experience.

author: Ori Doolman
text: Good atmosphere, great selection of beers. Too many smokers outside... :(

author: Igor Akerman
text: Already visited twice, still to come. Great atmosphere, decent price. Love this place.

author: Dorian Efrati
text: great bar with lots of option to chose of a bearl bear and cheap prices.

author: Yehuda
text: Nice but it's Israel so expensive

author: Boaz Ben Moshe
text: Readable prices for great beer!

author: Pavel Tarnopolski
text: Relatively quite calm place with amazing fresh beer and good prices! 颅茠忙矛

author: Nick O
text: Huge selection on tap, pleasant sitting spaces, and good prices!

author: Reno Reyns
text: Cheapest rates for tap beer I have seen in IL

author: DoronZ
text: Nice place with nice music. Lots of room to sit and talk arround

author: Pasha Teplitsky
text: Great beer, reasonable prices, ok food

author: Natalee Shein
text: Good place to drink beer with some side dish, not expensive, self serving

author: Felix Kulish
text: Great place, a great assortment of alcohol for a very good prices.

author: Gil Weisz
text: Pretty cool, the beer has great prices.

author: Leonid Fonaryov
text: Self service, great prices and assortment.

author: Sergey Starodub
text: Good beer prices. Tasty food

author: Arkady Vainshtein
text: Quality beer, amazing prices

author: Boaz Adar
text: Good beer  fair price . Sandwich recommended

author: Yuri Daniel
text: Reasonable price, lot of taps , good food

author: Saji Varghese
text: 颅茠忙卯颅茠忙卯颅茠忙卯颅茠忙卯颅茠忙卯  good to timepass

author: Chen Segev
text: Great beers, awesome prices!

author: Sasha Smolyak
text: Nice and cozy place, many different beers

author: Boris Ostrovsky
text: The best local pab. Highly recommended.

author: Michael Raginsky
text: Good choice of beers by incredibly low price

author: Erez Segev
text: Great place for cold beer

author: shahar bir
text: Beer and good food is the perfect combination

author: Roey Kamran
text: Great verity of beers, great prices.

author: Julia Zhaglina (RenderTheMoment)
text: Pleasant place for after work beer

author: hen hatuka
text: I love lager

author: Erez Epstein
text: Good food

author: Alon Kosonovsky
text: Extremely fast food preparation

author: Noam Guttman
text: Great selection of beers and food.

author: 脦脰脦贸脦潞脦忙 脦驴脦貌脦忙脦谩脦脰脦脡脦脝脦脰脦茠
text: Nice bar

author: Gilad Leifman
text: Great beer with the best prices

author: Ihor Zeiger
text: Good food and not expensive

author: costi s.
text: Best beer place around

author: ASSAF HARASH
text: Good atmosphere and nice place

author: M M
text: Very nice place

author: 脭脟陆脦脡脦拢脦霉脦脰 脦帽脦脰脦脰脦茠 (脭脟卢Elchai Fine脭脟录脭脟脜)脭脟录脭脟脛
text: cool

author: porcela1n
text: Great as always

author: Dima Zevelev
text: Great place

author: Yoni Y
text: Welcoming place

author: Nikolay
text: Best place !!!!

author: Gila Itsekson
text: best!!!!!!!!!!!!!! great team!!!!!!!!!!! thank you
